# poll-it.live

> Real-time audience polling for live events, meetings, and presentations.

## What it does

poll-it.live lets a host create a poll session, add questions (multiple choice, true/false, or 1-5 scale), and present results live on a big screen. Audience members vote from their phones by entering a six-letter join code — no app install, no login required.

## How it works

1. Host signs in and creates a session with a title.
2. Host adds questions with answer options.
3. Host goes live — a join code and QR code appear on the presenter screen.
4. Audience opens poll-it.live on their phone, enters the code, and votes.
5. Results update in real time as votes land.
6. Host steps through questions and ends the session when done.
7. A results summary page shows all questions with final vote tallies.

## Key features

- Sub-second vote latency (1.5s polling interval)
- QR code + six-letter join code for instant audience access
- Presenter view optimized for projectors (large type, high contrast)
- Mobile-first voter experience (no install, no login)
- Three question types: multiple choice, true/false, 1-5 scale
- Session lifecycle: draft → live → ended (with reset capability)
- Results page with per-question vote breakdown

## Technical stack

- React 19 single-page app with hash-based routing
- Wix Headless platform (https://www.wix.com/lp-en/headless) — Wix SDK + Wix Data collections
- Wix OAuth for host authentication (PKCE, fragment response mode)
- Deployed to Wix CDN via @wix/cli
- Custom domain: poll-it.live

## URLs

- Landing page: https://poll-it.live/
- Join a poll: https://poll-it.live/#/join/{CODE}
- Presenter view: https://poll-it.live/#/present/{CODE}
- Session editor: https://poll-it.live/#/session/{ID}
- Results: https://poll-it.live/#/results/{CODE}

## API

poll-it.live uses the Wix Data REST API. Data is stored in three collections:
- PollSessions: title, code, status (draft/live/ended), activeQuestionId
- PollQuestions: sessionId, prompt, type (tf/mc/scale), options (JSON array), order
- PollVotes: sessionId, questionId, choice, voterId

## Contact
